§6Crystallizer§f:
The §6Crystallizer §f(advancedrocketry:crystallizer) is a §emultiblock processing machine §f that §bgrows §bsilicon crystals §f from §6molten silicon§f. It is the §6second machine §f in the §6silicon-processing pipeline §f and the §6only way §f to produce §6silicon wafers §f in Advanced Rocketry.

§6Production Path§f:
- The §6Crystallizer §f is a §6multiblock machine §f with no §6direct §fcrafting recipe
- Crafted via the §6Crafting Table §f from §6components §f — see the §6Crafting Table §f quest
- §eTip§f: check §6JEI §f for the §bcurrent §f recipe in your pack
- Yields 1× Crystallizer

§6Function§f:
- §bCrystal growth §f: grows §bsilicon crystals §f from §6molten silicon §f over time
- §bTemperature control §f: maintains a §bprecise temperature §f during crystal growth
- §bPower §f: §b500 RF/t §f at idle, scales with crystal size
- §bMultiblock §f: 3×3×3 hollow cube with §6Structure Towers §f on the corners
- §bInput/Output §f: §6Liquid IO Circuit Boards §f on §binner faces §f handle fluid I/O
- §bCrystal yield §f: §b1-2 §fWafers per cycle

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Crystallizer §f with a §6Quartz Crucible §f for §bautomated §fsilicon production
- §eTip§f: the §6Crystallizer §f is §bslow §f but produces §bhigh-purity §fcrystals
- §cWarning§f: the §6Crystallizer §f requires §bcontinuous §fpower; a §cpower loss §f will §bbreak §f the growing crystal
- §cWarning§f: a §6quench §f (water) on a §bgrowing crystal §f will §cdestroy §f it; never place water above the multiblock
